strengths: no building prerequisites — maximum build order flexibility
Ballista Elephant is a unique and powerful ranged siege unit on a cavalry chassis
strongest Battle Elephants in the game when fully upgraded
strong Scorpions with extra range from unique tech
great farming eco — no Mill required to place farms
weaknesses: no Thumb Ring — archers are inaccurate and unreliable
no Camels — vulnerable to enemy cavalry without elephant support
Ballista Elephants are expensive and extremely vulnerable to Monks
no Heresy technology — enemy Monks converting elephants is devastating
no prereqs can encourage sloppy play — eco discipline still matters
unique_unit: Ballista Elephant — mounted Scorpion with high HP and pierce armour; bolts pass through multiple units; devastating in masses

unique_tech.castle_age: Tusk Swords — Battle Elephants gain +3 attack
unique_tech.imperial_age: Double Crossbow — Ballista Elephants and Scorpions fire two bolts simultaneously

economy_bonuses: Farmers do not need a Mill to place farms — saves wood and simplifies build order
No building prerequisites — Siege Workshop, Stable, or Archery Range can be built without unlocking prior buildings
build_order_notes: No-prereq bonus allows skipping straight to Siege Workshop or Stable from Dark Age if needed. Standard play is fast Castle into Battle Elephants or a siege push. Ballista Elephants require Castle plus Siege Workshop but dominate in Imperial. Always screen elephants from Monks with Hussars or Scorpions.
common_pairings: Britons — Briton archers screen for Khmer elephants and siege while Khmer cover melee
Aztecs — Aztec Monks counter enemy Monks that threaten Khmer elephants
Vietnamese — Rattan Archers combined with Khmer siege and elephants is a dominant late-game combo

power_spikes.feudal_age: Weak — limited aggressive options and no strong archer upgrade path
power_spikes.castle_age: Strong — Battle Elephants with Tusk Swords are hard to stop without Monks
power_spikes.imperial_age: Very strong — Double Crossbow Ballista Elephants and Scorpions shred everything
